name: wp-bazzite-e2e-arch-validation
title: End-to-end hex architecture validation on Bazzite (GPU)
description: Comprehensive validation of hex system on target deployment environment: system health, project execution, architecture enforcement, swarm coordination, and tiered inference routing with GPU acceleration.

phases.title: Hex system health validation
phases.description: Verify all hex system components operational: SpacetimeDB, hex-nexus, Ollama, CLI connectivity

tasks.title: Bootstrap complete stack on Bazzite
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite './target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/hex bootstrap --profile dev --skip-prereq'
Verify output shows all components started (SpacetimeDB, hex-nexus, Ollama with models)

tasks.title: Validate hex doctor passes
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'hex doctor composition'
Should report: ✓ SpacetimeDB, ✓ hex-nexus, ✓ Ollama, ✓ CLAUDE_SESSION_ID (or standalone mode)

tasks.title: Verify nexus dashboard accessible
tasks.description:
ssh -L 5555:localhost:5555 bazzite 'sleep 60'
Browser: http://localhost:5555
Should show dashboard with project status, swarms, inference metrics

tasks.title: Check Ollama GPU inference working
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'OLLAMA_VULKAN=true ollama run qwen3:4b "What is hex?" --stream'
Should stream response from GPU (not CPU). Check /proc/gpu or nvidia-smi if available.

phases.title: Deploy and validate example hex project
phases.description: Clone hex-task-tracker (4-layer hexagonal example), verify structure, run workplan

tasks.title: Clone hex-task-tracker on Bazzite
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'cd /tmp && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/gaberger/hex-task-tracker.git && cd hex-task-tracker && hex init'
Should create .hex/ directory with project.json, hooks, agents

tasks.title: Run hex analyze on project
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'cd /tmp/hex-task-tracker && hex analyze .'
Should validate hexagonal boundaries:
- domain/ imports only domain/
- ports/ imports domain/ only
- adapters/ import ports/ only
- composition-root imports adapters
No violations expected.

tasks.title: List available workplans in project
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'cd /tmp/hex-task-tracker && hex plan list'
Should show workplans in docs/workplans/

phases.title: Architecture enforcement validation
phases.description: Verify hex rules are enforced via ADRs, dead code analysis, and compilation gates

tasks.title: Check ADRs are loaded and visible
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'cd /tmp/hex-task-tracker && hex adr list'
Should show project ADRs (ADR-001, ADR-002, etc. depending on project)

tasks.title: Run cargo check with hex enforce rules
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'cd /tmp/hex-task-tracker && cargo check --workspace'
Should compile cleanly. If violations exist, cargo check will fail.

tasks.title: Validate dead code analyzer catches violations
tasks.description:
Intentionally add a boundary violation (e.g., adapter importing another adapter) in a test branch.
hex analyze . should report the violation.
Revert change.

phases.title: Swarm coordination validation (HexFlo)
phases.description: Verify multi-agent workplan execution with task tracking, heartbeats, memory sync

tasks.title: Initiate swarm and create tasks
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'hex swarm init bazzite-test hierarchical'
Should create swarm with ID.
hex task create <swarm-id> 'Test task 1'
hex task create <swarm-id> 'Test task 2'
Should list 2 pending tasks.

tasks.title: Spawn background worker agents
tasks.description:
For each task, spawn a hex-coder agent:
hex task assign <task-id> hex-coder
Agent should poll task, mark in_progress, execute work, mark completed.
Verify via hex swarm status (shows agents, heartbeats, task progress)

tasks.title: Validate memory sync across agents
tasks.description:
One agent stores: hex memory store 'key1' 'value1'
Another agent retrieves: hex memory get 'key1'
Should see 'value1' (via SpacetimeDB or SQLite fallback)

tasks.title: Check agent heartbeats and stale detection
tasks.description:
Verify agents beat on every prompt submit.
hex swarm status should show heartbeat timestamps.
After 120s of inactivity, agents marked 'dead' and tasks reclaimed.

phases.title: Tiered inference routing validation (GPU)
phases.description: Verify T1-T3 dispatch, best-of-N, compile gate, GPU acceleration on Bazzite Strix Halo

tasks.title: Verify project.json tier models configured
tasks.description:
ssh bazzite 'cat ~/.hex/project.json | jq .inference.tier_models'
Should show:
  t1: qwen3:4b
  t2: qwen2.5-coder:32b
  t2_5: devstral-small-2:24b

tasks.title: Test T1 dispatch (scaffold/transform)
tasks.description:
Create workplan task with strategy_hint: 'scaffold'
Inference gateway should route to T1 (qwen3:4b).
Verify: hex inference escalation-report shows T1 usage

tasks.title: Test T2 dispatch (codegen) with best-of-N
tasks.description:
Create workplan task with strategy_hint: 'codegen'
Inference gateway routes to T2 (qwen2.5-coder:32b) and generates 3 candidates.
Compile gate (cargo check) selects best.
Verify: escal report shows T2 best-of-N count

tasks.title: Test T2.5 dispatch (inference/complex reasoning)
tasks.description:
Create workplan task with strategy_hint: 'inference'
Routes to T2.5 (devstral-small-2:24b) for cross-adapter or architectural reasoning.
Verify: escal report shows T2.5 single-shot (no best-of-N)

tasks.title: Benchmark GPU inference on Bazzite Strix Halo
tasks.description:
Run qwen3:4b inference 5 times, measure tokens/sec:
OLLAMA_VULKAN=true ollama run qwen3:4b "<prompt>" --stream | measure
Expected: 32 tok/s (GPU) vs 11 tok/s (CPU)
Verify GPU acceleration is 3x faster.

tasks.title: Verify escalation tracking and overflow handling
tasks.description:
Simulate T1/T2/T2.5 timeout or failure.
Inference gateway should escalate to next tier or fallback to Claude API if configured.
Verify: escal report shows escalation count, recovery strategy

phases.title: Integration test: full workplan execution on Bazzite
phases.description: Run a real multi-phase workplan end-to-end with swarms, agents, architecture checks, GPU inference

tasks.title: Create integration test workplan
tasks.description:
Design 3-phase workplan:
- P1: Domain + ports (T1 scaffold on qwen3:4b)
- P2: Adapters (T2 codegen on qwen2.5-coder:32b with best-of-N)
- P3: Integration tests (T2.5 reasoning on devstral-small-2:24b)
Each phase spawns agents, validates architecture, runs tests.

tasks.title: Execute workplan autonomously on Bazzite
tasks.description:
hex plan execute wp-bazzite-e2e-integration-test.json
Monitor via: hex swarm status, hex inference escalation-report
Should complete all phases with 0 architecture violations, 100% test pass

tasks.title: Collect performance metrics and report
tasks.description:
Gather:
- Inference timing per tier (T1/T2/T2.5 latency, tok/s)
- GPU utilization (OLLAMA_VULKAN=true efficiency)
- Agent coordination overhead (swarm heartbeat, memory sync)
- Architecture analysis runtime
Generate: docs/bazzite-e2e-report.md with results
